# Art Prompt Template: [asset-type]

> **Status**: [DRAFT / LOCKED]
> **Asset Type**: [e.g. characters, item, environment, ui]
> **Locked On**: [YYYY-MM-DD — set when Status becomes LOCKED]
> **Iteration Rounds**: [N — number of ITERATE cycles before APPROVED]
> **Art Bible Version**: [date of art bible last read]

---

## Style Keywords

[5–10 specific, combinable terms. Each traces to the art bible or a reference.]

- [keyword] — [art bible section or reference it comes from]
- [keyword] — [source]

---

## Color Constraints

[3–5 rules. Name semantic roles explicitly.]

- [Rule. e.g. "Use Threat Blue (#1A3A5C) for hostile elements — never warm tones on enemies"]
- [Rule]

---

## Shape Language Rules

[2–4 rules derived from the art bible's Shape Language section.]

- [Rule. e.g. "Enemy silhouettes must be readable at 64×64px — no fine detail on outer contour"]
- [Rule]

---

## Composition Notes

[1–3 notes on framing, focal point, and perspective for this asset type at its in-game display size.]

- [Note]

---

## Negative Prompts

[5–10 specific exclusions with reasons.]

- [Thing to exclude] — [reason: conflicts with art bible §X / reference direction]
- [Thing to exclude] — [reason]

---

## Full Generation Prompt

[Ready-to-use text prompt. Usable without modification as a starting point for batch generation.]

```
[prompt text here]
```

| Parameter | Art Bible Section | Rule Applied |
|-----------|-------------------|--------------|
| [keyword or rule] | §[N] [Section Name] | [specific rule cited] |

| Round | Date | Verdict | Notes |

## Open Issues
